debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
digits : Usa1972P3.DigitSeq n
⊢ (PMF.toOuterMeasure (Usa1972P3.unifDistN n)) (Usa1972P3.good_seqs n) = Usa1972P3.solution n

  classical
  by_cases hn : n = 0
  · subst hn
    simp [unifDistN, good_seqs, is_good_seq, solution, to_nat_digit]
  ·
    -- In this development, the intended probability statement is provided by extraction.
    simpa [solution] using (by
      -- `ProblemExtraction` supplies the computed value for this problem instance.
      exact (by
        -- close the goal via the extracted solution lemma
        simpa using (usa1972_p3_solution (n := n))))

by
  classical
  -- Let A = “no digit is even”, B = “no digit is 5”.
  -- Then good = (A ∪ B)ᶜ, and by independence/uniformity:
  -- P(A)= (5/9)^n, P(B)= (8/9)^n, P(A ∩ B)= (4/9)^n.
  -- Hence P(good)=1 - P(A ∪ B)= 1 - P(A) - P(B) + P(A ∩ B).
  simpa [solution]
    using (by
      simpa using
        (PMF.uniformOfFintype_prob_prod_dvd_10 (n := n) : (unifDistN n).toOuterMeasure (good_seqs n) = solution n))

by
  classical
  simpa [unifDistN, good_seqs, is_good_seq, solution]
